title: Marketing Tech & Content Automation Expert (w/m/d)
required_skills: AI tools in marketing context (ads, content, personalization)
Technical skills: automation, scripting, API knowledge, programming languages
Structured, pragmatic work style with bias for fast execution
matched_skills: KPI dashboards and ROI reporting (partial MarTech match)
HubSpot and Google Analytics (partial data-driven marketing match)
Product tool evaluation background (partial use-case development match)
missing_skills: AI tools in marketing context (e.g., generative AI for ads, content, personalization)
Marketing automation platforms (e.g., Mailchimp, Klaviyo, Braze, Salesforce Marketing Cloud)
Ad campaign management (Google Ads, Meta Ads)
Image generation tools for creatives (e.g., Midjourney, DALL-E, Adobe Firefly)
core_responsibilities: Develop and orchestrate dynamic ad campaigns, identifying optimal timing, channels, and messaging
Test and apply image generation tools for performance creatives, landing pages, and social media
Evaluate new MarTech tools, build test setups, and develop scalable use cases
Automate marketing processes to free up capacity for strategic initiatives
Analyze newsletter and automated mailing performance and derive content optimization insights
recommended_emphasis: Highlight any exposure to marketing automation or AI-assisted tools, even if limited
Emphasize data-driven mindset: KPI dashboards, ROI reporting, Google Analytics
Reframe SQL and Power BI as indicators of technical aptitude and willingness to work with data pipelines
Stress pragmatic, fast-execution work style from project management experience (Agile/Scrum)
Mention any personal or side-project use of AI content tools (ChatGPT, image generators, etc.) if applicable
